title: Metal Barrels
body:
This mod adds additional barrels to the game that can store more items.

 

They function like their vanilla counterparts in that they can be opened with a solid block on top and don't cause any fps issues in large numbers unlike chests.



Copper stores 45 stacks

Iron stores 54 stacks

Silver stores 72 stacks

Gold stores 81 stacks

Diamond stores 108 stacks

Crystal stored 108 stacks and is transparent

Obsidian stores 108 stacks but has a blast resistance equivalent to obsidian making it resistant to most explosions

Netherite stores 135 stacks and has the fire resistance + blast resistance of netherite

 There are now upgrade items that can be used to upgrade already placed barrels without breaking them, the contents will not be destroyed or dropped if used.

Upgrade Triangle
![Image of all barrel upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cc53c20ba5f96bf33c0f6979ade06e3c9647be6.png)
